name: Greek Honey Hot Sauce

ingredients.item: strained fresh lemon juice, plus more for seasoning
good-quality honey, preferably raw Greek pine honey
Several drops of hot sauce, to taste
Place all the ingredients in the bowl of a food processor and puree until smooth.
Taste and season with more lemon juice, hot sauce, and/or salt as needed.
